nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the copilot components folder, explaining the CopilotKit sidebar/chat bridge components and how they fit the web UI.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the landing components folder, describing the upload/entry landing screen components and their role in the app flow.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the MCQ components folder, covering the one-card-at-a-time quiz widget with green/red feedback and retry behavior.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the plan components folder, describing the lesson-plan approval (HITL) UI components.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Overview of the web components tree, mapping each subfolder (copilot, landing, mcq, plan, shell, summary, ui) to its role in the lesson UI.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the shell components folder, describing the app layout/frame components that host the lesson experience.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the summary components folder, covering the end-of-lesson summarize/recap UI components.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the shared UI primitives folder, describing the reusable design-system components consumed across features.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the web hooks folder, describing custom React hooks that bridge CoAgent state and the lesson UI.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the web lib folder, describing shared client-side utilities and helpers for the Next.js app.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Directory guide for the web types folder, describing app-local TypeScript type declarations layered atop the shared schema contracts.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Minimal placeholder note for the docs assets folder that stores images and diagrams referenced by the documentation.

nodes.name: design-system.md
nodes.summary: Canonical EdPath design-system reference defining color palette, typography, spacing, elevation, iconography, and how design tokens flow into the web app.

nodes.name: eslint.config.mjs
nodes.summary: ESLint flat config for the Next.js web app, wiring the lint ruleset that governs the frontend codebase.

nodes.name: next.config.ts
nodes.summary: Next.js framework configuration for the edpath-web app controlling build and runtime behavior.

nodes.name: postcss.config.mjs
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling the Tailwind/CSS processing pipeline for the web app's styles.

nodes.name: vitest.config.mts
nodes.summary: Vitest test-runner configuration for the web app, defining the test environment, aliases, and coverage setup.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the shared @repo/schemas workspace package, declaring the Zod dependency and the exports surface consumed by web and backend.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel entry point for @repo/schemas that re-exports every Zod contract (primitives, lesson-plan, mcq, feedback, summary, resume, upload, error, scoring, constants) as the single source of truth for both ends.
nodes.languageNotes: Barrel re-exports using .js extension specifiers for ESM/NodeNext resolution over TypeScript sources.

nodes.name: primitives.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the foundational Zod primitives DifficultySchema and VerdictSchema reused across the higher-level lesson and grading contracts.

nodes.name: lesson-plan.ts
nodes.summary: Zod contract for the lesson plan, defining ObjectiveSchema and LessonPlanSchema that gate the HITL approval step of the teaching workflow.

nodes.name: mcq.ts
nodes.summary: Zod contracts for quiz cards: the full MCQSchema, McqBatchSchema, and the PublicMCQSchema that strips correctIndex/explanation/hint for the assist firewall.
nodes.languageNotes: PublicMCQSchema encodes the structural assist firewall by omitting answer-revealing fields from the client-facing shape.

nodes.name: feedback.ts
nodes.summary: Zod contract for grading feedback (FeedbackSchema) returned after each MCQ attempt, carrying verdict and conceptual guidance shapes.

nodes.name: error.ts
nodes.summary: Zod contracts for error handling (ErrorNodeSchema, ErrorKindSchema, LastErrorSchema) that model recoverable failure state in the graph.

nodes.name: constants.ts
nodes.summary: Shared workflow constants MAX_ATTEMPTS and MAX_HELP that bound the no-penalty retry loop and the help side-channel.
